## Plot use

```{r}
#| label: plot use table

plot_use_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "plot_use_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::plot_use(
  plot_df = plot_use_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  plot_use_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$plot_use_plot_use_var),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)

```
